channel.title: Projects on Kevin's Profile
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Kevin's Profile

item.title: SF Express Courier Manager System
item.description: Focused on aligning enterprise system architecture with operational workflows, business scalability, and organizational efficiency.

item.title: Cold Chain Logistics System
item.description: Participated in designing scalable enterprise systems integrating event-driven architecture, distributed services, and real-time data processing

item.title: ZTO Jingxuan E-Commerce System
item.description: Designed and implemented core business modules for enterprise logistics workflows, focusing on backend service development, database modeling, and API integration
